summary: Finalized implementation plan for CapCut Assembler tab. Uses assembly_manifest.json as sole input contract. UI provides folder browsing for images/audio/manifests, settings for resolution/transition/chapter gaps. Core builder reads manifests, calculates multi-chapter offsets with random gaps, and generates CapCut draft folders using pyJianYingDraft. Three new files: ui/capcut_assembler_tab.py, core/capcut_draft_builder.py, plus one line added to ui/main_window.py.
